Mission Failed. To attempt your challenge again, you must exit the map. [$inst]To exit, click "Leave Coliseum"[$/inst] If you wish to stay, you can exit later by returning to the [$loc]Arena Entrance[$loc]. [$inst]To stay, click "Stay"[$inst]
Warning: You are too close to the doors!
Warning: Too close to Doors!  Turn Back!
Warning: GET AWAY FROM THE DOORS!

[$emote]BIOMUTE CHALLENGE
--------------------[$/emote]

The Biomute Challenge takes place in three successive waves inside our largest arena, [$loc]Hell's Highway[$/loc]. When a wave is complete, you must return to the center of the arena to start the next wave. [$inst]If all players aren't at the waypoint at the beginning of a wave, the mission will fail[$/inst].

WAVE 1
Location: Hell's Highway
Goal: [$imp]Eliminate 30 Biomute Backbiters and 8 Harrassers.[$/imp]

WAVE 2
Location: Hell's Highway
Goal: [$imp]Eliminate 45 Biomute Refuse before time runs out.[$/imp]

WAVE 3
Location: Hell's Highway
Goal: [$imp]Eliminate 20 Biomute Cudgels before time runs out.[$/imp]

[$emote]JUSTICE CHALLENGE
--------------------[$/emote]

The Justice Challenge takes place in three successive waves inside [$loc]The Murder Yard[$/loc]. When a wave is complete, you must return to the center of the arena to start the next wave. [$inst]If all players aren't at the waypoint at the beginning of a wave, the mission will fail[$/inst].

WAVE 1
Location: The Murder Yard
Goal: [$imp]Eliminate 30 Justice Guerillas and 8 Rogues.[$/imp]

WAVE 2
Location: The Murder Yard
Goal: [$imp]Eliminate 12 Justice Marauders before time runs out.[$/imp]

WAVE 3
Location: The Murder Yard
Goal: [$imp]Defend the Pile of Crates from Justice Guerillas.[$/imp]
Teams of Justice Guerillas will make runs at the Pile of Crates. If even one of them reaches the crates, they will be destroyed and you will fail the challenge. The crates must remain untouched for 4 minutes to complete this wave.

[$emote]JUSTICE MEGA-CHALLENGE
-------------------------[$/emote]

The Justice Mega-Challenge takes place in three successive waves inside [$loc]Hell's Highway[$/loc] and [$loc]The Meat Grinder[$/loc]. When a wave is complete, you must return to the center of the appropriate arena to start the next wave. [$inst]If all players aren't at the waypoint at the beginning of a wave, the mission will fail[$/inst].

WAVE 1
Location: Hell's Highway
Goal: [$imp]Kill 10 Justice Prowlers and 5 Justice Carriers.[$/imp]

WAVE 2
Location: Hell's Highway
Goal: [$imp]Keep the Justice Overseers from destroying all the Crates.[$/imp]
Justice Overseers will fly toward the Pile of Crates and slowly destroy them. At least one crate must survive for the entire four minutes to complete this wave.

WAVE 3
Location: The Meat Grinder
Goal: [$imp]Survive for 3 minutes against an onslaught of Justice Infantry.[$/imp]
Warning: STAY OUT OF THIS ROOM!
